About.story: Born in our boutique atelier in Düzce out of a passion for uniting natural wood and premium leather with fine paper, Book n Case designs not just notebooks, but a legacy to preserve your thoughts for generations. The delicate craftsmanship of master hands is woven into every stitch, cover, and detail.
About.value1Desc: Unique pieces created with traditional bookbinding techniques and meticulous hand-stitching.
About.value2Desc: Environmentally respectful, recyclable materials and ethical sourcing.
About.value3Desc: Genuine Italian leather, fountain pen friendly 120gsm ivory paper, and uncompromised quality.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: We are always here to assist with our atelier, products, or custom orders.
Contact.successToast: Your message has been received. We will respond shortly.
